utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Checking the final property solution, it contains all six sections. Each section is fully detailed: the property includes name, location, details, price; financing includes type, interest rate, amortization, down payment, loan amount, monthly payment, lender fees; legal_services includes itemized costs and total; moving_services includes company, cost, storage; setup_services includes utilities with breakdown and setup costs; total_budget includes full cost breakdown with totals. All items are fully specified with details matching what the format requests.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected 'Liberty West Lofts Toronto Condo' as the property. This is a purchase property priced at CAD $468,000, which fits within Zara Patel’s stated purchase budget range (CAD $420–480K). Among the ground-truth purchase options, the one closest in price and characteristics (modern, eco-conscious, creative workspace, located in Liberty Village) is 'New Build' (CAD $480K, rating 10). For financing, the AI used a 'Traditional Fixed 25-Year Mortgage (Liberty National Standard)', which aligns with the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (rating 8). For legal services, it included standard legal fees, title search, property survey, and inspection—this collectively aligns most closely with the 'Basic Legal Package' (rating 9) and 'Basic Survey' (rating 9). The moving company was 'Toronto MovePro Local' with an estimated cost of CAD $950, which corresponds to the 'Premium Moving' option (rating 7). The utilities setup totaling CAD $350 with high-speed internet and eco-provider fits the 'Premium Utilities' category (rating 9).
